name: Sarah Nutri - Forum Manual Queue -> Discord Review

parameters.jsCode:
const config = {
  "brand": "Sarah Nutri",
  "mode": "human_approval_required",
  "daily_approved_post_limit": 5,
  "affiliate_link_probability": 0.15,
  "default_disclosure": "Disclosure: this may be an affiliate link, which means I may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.",
  "reddit": {
    "search_limit": 15,
    "search_query": "(elderly OR senior OR \"aging parent\" OR caregiver OR arthritis OR mobility OR sleep OR constipation OR appetite OR hydration OR \"blood pressure\")",
    "target_subreddits": [
      "AgingParents",
      "CaregiverSupport",
      "eldercare",
      "AskOldPeopleAdvice",
      "nutrition",
      "Supplements"
    ],
    "blocked_subreddits": [
      "AskDocs",
      "medical",
      "DiagnoseMe"
    ]
  },
  "quora": {
    "daily_manual_post_limit": 5,
    "source_mode": "draft_only_until_reviewed",
    "google_query": "site:quora.com elderly senior health caregiver nutrition sleep mobility question"
  },
  "safety": {
    "block_if_contains": [
      "chest pain",
      "stroke",
      "suicidal",
      "suicide",
      "overdose",
      "can't breathe",
      "cannot breathe",
      "severe bleeding",
      "fainted",
      "unconscious",
      "sepsis",
      "blood in stool",
      "blood in urine"
    ],
    "requires_human_review": [
      "medication",
      "dose",
      "dosage",
      "diagnosis",
      "treatment",
      "cancer",
      "diabetes",
      "kidney disease",
      "heart failure",
      "dementia"
    ]
  }
};
const products = [
  {
    "slug": "hydration-electrolytes",
    "name": "Senior-friendly hydration support",
    "affiliate_url": "https://example.com/affiliate/hydration",
    "match_keywords": [
      "hydration",
      "dehydrated",
      "electrolyte",
      "cramps",
      "water"
    ],
    "use_when": "The person is asking about hydration habits, mild dehydration prevention, or staying hydrated during heat or low appetite.",
    "avoid_when": "The person reports confusion, fainting, severe illness, kidney disease, heart failure, or medication changes."
  },
  {
    "slug": "protein-shake",
    "name": "Easy protein nutrition shake",
    "affiliate_url": "https://example.com/affiliate/protein-shake",
    "match_keywords": [
      "protein",
      "appetite",
      "muscle",
      "weak",
      "weight loss",
      "meal replacement"
    ],
    "use_when": "The question is about low appetite, simple protein intake, or maintaining muscle with aging.",
    "avoid_when": "The person has kidney disease, unexplained weight loss, swallowing problems, or needs medical nutrition therapy."
  },
  {
    "slug": "fiber-support",
    "name": "Gentle fiber support",
    "affiliate_url": "https://example.com/affiliate/fiber",
    "match_keywords": [
      "constipation",
      "fiber",
      "regular",
      "digestion",
      "bowel"
    ],
    "use_when": "The person asks about simple food and routine support for occasional constipation.",
    "avoid_when": "The person reports blood, severe pain, bowel obstruction risk, sudden major bowel changes, or unexplained weight loss."
  },
  {
    "slug": "mobility-bands",
    "name": "Light resistance bands",
    "affiliate_url": "https://example.com/affiliate/resistance-bands",
    "match_keywords": [
      "mobility",
      "walking",
      "strength",
      "exercise",
      "balance",
      "chair exercise"
    ],
    "use_when": "The person asks about gentle strength, balance, or simple home movement for older adults.",
    "avoid_when": "The person has acute injury, falls, severe pain, fracture concern, or needs physical therapy clearance."
  },
  {
    "slug": "sleep-routine",
    "name": "Sleep routine support kit",
    "affiliate_url": "https://example.com/affiliate/sleep",
    "match_keywords": [
      "sleep",
      "insomnia",
      "night",
      "routine",
      "tired"
    ],
    "use_when": "The person asks about sleep hygiene, bedtime routine, or non-medical sleep habits.",
    "avoid_when": "The person mentions sedatives, sleep apnea, confusion, falls, medication interactions, or severe depression."
  }
];
const body = $json.body || $json || {};
const defaultReddit = {
  platform: 'reddit',
  title: 'Caregiver asking how to help an older parent eat enough protein',
  body: 'My elderly mother has very little appetite and I am worried she is losing strength. What are simple ways to help without making meals complicated?',
  url: '',
  subreddit: 'AgingParents'
};
const defaultQuora = {
  platform: 'quora',
  title: 'What are easy nutrition habits that help elderly people keep their strength?',
  body: 'Looking for practical advice for older adults who do not eat much and get tired easily.',
  url: ''
};
function cleanCandidate(input, fallback, platform) {
  const value = input && typeof input === 'object' ? input : fallback;
  return {
    platform,
    title: String(value.title || fallback.title || '').trim(),
    body: String(value.body || value.text || fallback.body || '').trim(),
    url: String(value.url || value.permalink || '').trim(),
    subreddit: String(value.subreddit || '').trim()
  };
}
const reddit = cleanCandidate(body.reddit, defaultReddit, 'reddit');
const quora = cleanCandidate(body.quora, defaultQuora, 'quora');
return [{ json: { brand: config.brand, config, products, reddit, quora, intakeNotes: String(body.notes || '').trim() } }];

const products = ($json.products || []).filter((p) => p.affiliate_url).map((p) => ({ slug: p.slug, name: p.name, match_keywords: p.match_keywords, use_when: p.use_when, avoid_when: p.avoid_when, affiliate_url: p.affiliate_url, source: p.source || 'manual_catalog' }));
const question = $json.reddit;
const prompt = "You are Sarah Nutri, writing as a warm, practical nutrition and healthy-aging voice.

The audience is older adults, caregivers, and families. Give useful general education, not diagnosis or treatment. Be kind, direct, and low-drama.

Hard rules:
- Do not claim to be the person's clinician.
- Do not diagnose, prescribe, or tell someone to change medication.
- If emergency symptoms appear, recommend urgent medical care and do not add a product link.
- If the question involves medication, dosing, cancer, diabetes, kidney disease, heart failure, dementia, severe symptoms, or unexplained weight loss, mark it as human_review.
- No product link unless the product is directly relevant and the answer is still useful without the product.
- If a product link is included, include the affiliate disclosure in plain language.
- Write like a real person helping, not an ad.

Return strict JSON only:
{
  "safety": "answer|human_review|emergency|skip",
  "affiliate_allowed": false,
  "selected_product_slug": null,
  "reply": "final Reddit comment text",
  "reason": "short internal reason"
}
" + '

Manual posting mode: draft one copy/paste-ready Reddit comment. Keep it under 1200 characters. Do not mention automation. If you include an affiliate link, include the disclosure.

Reddit question context:
' + JSON.stringify(question, null, 2) + '

Available product catalog, including synced Digistore24 entries if present:
' + JSON.stringify(products, null, 2) + '

Return strict JSON only.';
return [{ json: { ...$json, redditPrompt: prompt } }];

const products = ($json.products || []).filter((p) => p.affiliate_url).map((p) => ({ slug: p.slug, name: p.name, match_keywords: p.match_keywords, use_when: p.use_when, avoid_when: p.avoid_when, affiliate_url: p.affiliate_url, source: p.source || 'manual_catalog' }));
const question = $json.quora;
const prompt = "You are drafting a Quora answer for Sarah Nutri.

The answer should be higher effort than a Reddit comment: clear structure, practical steps, and a calm healthy-aging tone. Do not post directly from automation. Produce a draft for manual review.

Hard rules:
- General education only, not medical diagnosis.
- Include a clinician/registered dietitian caveat when the question is condition-specific.
- Use product links sparingly and only when directly relevant.
- Include an affiliate disclosure when a link is used.
- Avoid repetitive templates.

Return strict JSON only:
{
  "safety": "answer|human_review|emergency|skip",
  "affiliate_allowed": false,
  "selected_product_slug": null,
  "answer": "final Quora draft answer",
  "reason": "short internal reason"
}
" + '

Manual posting mode: draft one copy/paste-ready Quora answer. Keep it under 1800 characters so it fits a Discord review packet. Do not mention automation. If you include an affiliate link, include the disclosure.

Quora question context:
' + JSON.stringify(question, null, 2) + '

Available product catalog, including synced Digistore24 entries if present:
' + JSON.stringify(products, null, 2) + '

Return strict JSON only.';
return [{ json: { ...$json, quoraPrompt: prompt } }];
